amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 7 (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 58 — paragraph 7 (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The advisory forum shall hold meetings at least four times a year. The advisory forum may invite experts and other stakeholders to its meetings. The executive director may attend, ex officio, the meetings of the advisory forum.
parliament_text: The advisory forum shall hold meetings at least four times a year. The advisory forum may invite experts and other stakeholders to its meetings. The executive director may attend, ex officio, the meetings of the advisory forum.
